03 / Partners

A curated
consortium.

Each partner is best-in-class — additive manufacturing, coachbuilding, composites, engine engineering. Selected to elevate the technical and commercial credibility of a one-of-one, investment-grade build.

DMC
Mahle
Coventry Metalcraft
T3DMC
ASM AUTORECYCLING
BAMD
Cornerstone
HGL
04Roster

Named hands. Named houses.

01
DMC
Digital Manufacturing
The Digital Manufacturing Centre at Silverstone — host facility for final assembly and additive manufacture.
02
Mahle
Engine Engineering
Engine rebuild and validation. Motorsport-grade tolerances. UK engine programme.
03
Coventry Metalcraft
Coachbuilding
Hand-formed steel and aluminium panel work. Heritage techniques, modern measurement.
04
T3DMC
Scanning & Twin
Component-level 3D scanning and the live digital twin of the entire build.
05
ASM AUTORECYCLING
Dismantling specialists
RS500 #148 dismantle and part catalogue and storage
06
BAMD
Composite specialists
Composite partner for trim and interior
07
Cornerstone
non-structural repair specialists
Glass removal and specialist repairs
08
HGL
Membership Program
Technology providers for the project companion membership platform, Autovision.club
